parameters.query:
SELECT 
    t.*
FROM 
    tags_crm t
INNER JOIN 
    tag_funil_crm tfc
ON 
    t.id = tfc.id_tag
WHERE 
    tfc.id_etapa_funil = {{ $node["fluxo_chamado"].json["body"]["id_etapa_funil"] }}
    AND t.entidade = 'contact';

SELECT 
    t.*
FROM 
    tags_crm t
INNER JOIN 
    tag_funil_crm2 tfc
ON 
    t.id = tfc.id_tag
WHERE 
    tfc.id_situacao_checkout = {{ $node["fluxo_chamado"].json["body"]["id_situacao_checkout"] }}
    AND t.entidade = 'contact';
